_comment: Machine-enforced, time-boxed allowlist for the LOCAL exception-aware audit gate. Each entry binds to an exact advisory, package, installed version, vulnerable range, severity and dependency path, and applies only when raw APP_ENV is exactly 'local' or 'test' with no cloud/deployment marker present. It NEVER makes the raw audit clean: `npm run security:audit:raw` remains non-zero while any entry is in effect. Criticals can never be excepted. Cloud UAT and Production are machine-blocked.

exceptions.rationale: sharp <0.35.0 inherits libvips CVE-2026-33327/33328/35590/35591. sharp is reached only transitively through Next's optional image optimizer. next@15.5.21 is the latest STABLE 15.5.x and still declares optionalDependencies.sharp ^0.34.3, so no forward stable Next release resolves it; npm's only offered remediation is a downgrade to next@14.2.35 (breaking and older). Not reachable in this build.
compensatingControls: No application module imports sharp (verified by source scan).
All user-uploaded media is served through the controlled /media route.
components/CatalogueCards.tsx sets unoptimized={img.startsWith('/media/')}, so untrusted image bytes never reach Next's image optimizer; only repo-committed brand assets are optimized.
Raw audit remains visible and non-zero via `npm run security:audit:raw`.
exceptions.blockedMilestone: first cloud UAT — this exception must be resolved or formally re-approved before any public cloud deployment
